# Base context setup

**Preferred:** run [scripts/bp-install.sh](../../scripts/bp-install.sh) (or the script generated by the [Assistant UI](https://abx-git.github.io/blueprint-pattern.github.io/)). It installs behavior + scaffold via HTTPS — no git clone.

**Behavior** → `prompts/core/system-prompt.md` (installed). **Knowledge** → `<doc-root>/context/` (stubs installed; filled during adoption).

| Tool | Installed by `bp-install.sh` |
|------|------------------------------|
| **Cursor** | `.cursor/rules/blueprint-pattern.mdc` + `blueprint-context.mdc` |
| **Claude Code** | `CLAUDE.md` |
| **GitHub Copilot** | `.github/copilot-instructions.md` |
| **Other** | `AGENTS.md` |

Also installs: role prompts under `<doc-root>/prompts/`, workflow session prompts under `prompts/workflows/`, template folder, interface stubs.

Session prompts: paste from the Assistant UI (paths adjusted to your doc root) or read `prompts/workflows/<id>.md`.

See [Guide](../../docs/guide.md) for the full procedure.
